LanguageData.XFA_Greed.label: XFA_Greed
LanguageData.XFA_Greed.description: Slaughter the "Strange Ancient" and get the "Black Apple".
LanguageData.XFA_AnotherLife.label: Another Life
LanguageData.XFA_AnotherLife.description: Complete XF secret research and make a Phoenix Cloak.
LanguageData.XFA_FightForFreedom.label: Fight For Freedom
LanguageData.XFA_FightForFreedom.description: Complete XF secret research and make a Free Will Armor.
LanguageData.XFA_OnePiece.label: One Piece
LanguageData.XFA_OnePiece.description: Complete XF secret research and make a Golden Lion Armor.
LanguageData.XFA_RedLikeBlood.label: Red Like Blood
LanguageData.XFA_RedLikeBlood.description: Complete XF secret research and make a O Blade.
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorDB.label: The Best Armor - DB
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorDB.description: Buy a Dark Knight Armor from the black market traders.
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorFL.label: The Best Armor - FL
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorFL.description: Buy a Overlord Armor from the black market traders.
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorJG.label: The Best Armor - JG
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorJG.description: Buy a Fenrir Armor from the black market traders.
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorSE.label: The Best Armor - SE
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorSE.description: Buy a Transcender Armor from the black market traders.
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorXEO.label: The Best Armor - XEO
LanguageData.XFA_TheBestArmorXEO.description: Buy a Master Armor from the black market traders.
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldKBS.label: ReadWorld - King of Pirate
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldKBS.description: Carve a Giant Sculpture - King of Pirate.
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldPOX.label: ReadWorld - Phoenix
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldTOW.label: ReadWorld - Tale of White
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldTOW.description: Carve a Giant Sculpture - Free Will.
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldSNA.label: ReadWorld - Snake and Apple
LanguageData.XFA_ReadWorldSNA.description: Carve a Giant Sculpture - Wilderness Lover.
LanguageData.XFA_NotTheEnd.label: Not The End
LanguageData.XFA_NotTheEnd.description: Use Vic or XvA as Storyteller, with four or more members of the colony and all members down.* v1.4 does not require Vic or XvA as Storyteller.
LanguageData.XFA_FallinLove.label: Fall in Love
LanguageData.XFA_FallinLove.description: Have a colonist develop a bond with a Strange Ancient.
LanguageData.XFA_BulletInTheKnee.label: Bullet In The Knee
LanguageData.XFA_BulletInTheKnee.description: Have a single pawn score 150 Pawns Downed.
LanguageData.XFA_Atheist.label: XFA_Atheist
LanguageData.XFA_FireExtinguisher.label: Fire Extinguisher
LanguageData.XFA_HostTheGame.label: Host The Game
LanguageData.XFA_HuntTheHunter.label: Hunt The Hunter
LanguageData.XFA_TheDragon.label: The Dragon
LanguageData.XFA_DollSlayer.label: Doll Slayer
LanguageData.XFA_TooHugeTooHard.label: Too Huge, Too Hard
